languages.text: "Вы правы, Ваша Светлость. Нет лучше способа искупить грехи отцов, чем обратить оружие против ксеноса. Янур?"
"You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
languages.original_text: "Вы правы, Ваша Светлость. Нет лучше способа искупить грехи отцов, чем обратить оружие против ксеноса. Янур?"

traits.locale_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
"You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
"You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to settle a feud than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
"You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"
"You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

languages.text: 「おっしゃる通りでございます、御{mf|殿|殿}。敵対関係を解消するのに、より良い方法は、異種族を標的にする以外にありません。ジャヌール？」
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to settle a feud than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: 「おっしゃる通りでございます、御{mf|殿|殿}。敵対関係を解消するのに、より良い方法は、異種族を標的にする以外にありません。ジャヌール？」

languages.text: "Haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Atalarımızın yaptıklarının kefaretini ödemenin, silahlarımızı zenolara çevirmekten daha iyi bir yol yoktur. Janur..."
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: "Haklısınız {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Atalarımızın yaptıklarının kefaretini ödemenin, silahlarımızı zenolara çevirmekten daha iyi bir yol yoktur. Janur..."

languages.text: «Tiene razón, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No hay mejor forma de expiar las acciones de nuestros antepasados que combatir a los xenos. ¿Janur?».
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón, mi{mf|lord|lady}. No hay mejor forma de expiar las acciones de nuestros antepasados que combatir a los xenos. ¿Janur?».

languages.text: “您说得对，大人。枪口一致对向异形是为先祖的所作所为赎罪的最好方式。你说呢，雅努尔？”
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: “您说得对，大人。枪口一致对向异形是为先祖的所作所为赎罪的最好方式。你说呢，雅努尔？”

languages.text: « Vous avez raison, Votre Seigneurie. Je ne vois pas de meilleur moyen d'expier les fautes de nos ancêtres qu'en prenant les armes contre un xénos. Janur ? »
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison, Votre Seigneurie. Je ne vois pas de meilleur moyen d'expier les fautes de nos ancêtres qu'en prenant les armes contre un xénos. Janur ? »

languages.text: "Ihr habt recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Es gibt keinen besseren Weg, für die Taten unserer Vorfahren Buße zu tun, als Eure Waffen auf einen Xenos zu richten. Janur?"
languages.original_text: "You are right, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. No better way to atone for the deeds of our forebears than turning your weapons on a xenos. Janur?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt recht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Es gibt keinen besseren Weg, für die Taten unserer Vorfahren Buße zu tun, als Eure Waffen auf einen Xenos zu richten. Janur?"
